item.tconguns.base_bullet.description:
Basic Tinker Bullet, used as ammo for Tinker firearms.
Using other types of components allows for the crafting of specialized ammunition at the Tinker Station.
item.tconguns.base_bullet_head_red_sand_: Basic Bullet Head Red Sand Cast
item.tconguns.base_bullet_shell_red_sand: Basic Bullet Shell Red Sand Cast
item.tconguns.gun_small.description:
Lightweight tinker gun with a short barrel, causing bullets to lose velocity quickly after leaving the barrel. However, it is compact and lightweight, making it easy to dual-wield.
Note: Requires tinker bullets to function properly. Right-click while sneaking to open the magazine; after loading artisan bullets, press the reload key to reload (default key: R; see Key Bindings for details).
material.tconguns.blaze_powder.flavor: It could have been used to make some wine...
material.tconguns.blaze_powder.gunpowder: High-powered gunpowder, delivering powerful propulsion and equally formidable recoil.
material.tconguns.gunpowder.gunpowder: Ordinary gunpowder, providing moderate propulsive force and recoil.
material.tconguns.redstone.gunpowder: Low-power gunpowder, offering reduced recoil in exchange for diminished propulsive force.
modifier.tconguns.extended_barrel.confli: Barrel cannot be both extended and shortened at the same time.
modifier.tconguns.extended_barrel.descri: Makes bullets fired from the barrel more accurate and faster
modifier.tconguns.extended_magazine.flav: No need to worry about its stability
modifier.tconguns.full_auto.description: Activate full-auto bolt, hold down LMB!
modifier.tconguns.shortened_barrel.descr: Makes bullets fired from the barrel more dispersed and slower
modifier.tconguns.shortened_barrel.flavo: The shorter is the more dangerous!
tool_stat.tconguns.bullet_attack.descrip: The base damage dealt when ammunition hits; the final damage will be affected by the projectile's velocity at impact.
tool_stat.tconguns.bullet_recoil.descrip: The magnitude of recoil exerted on firearms during firing
tool_stat.tconguns.bullet_velocity.descr: Velocity when the bullet leaves the barrel (m/s)
tool_stat.tconguns.bullet_velocity_atten: The rate at which a projectile's velocity decays during flight; the higher this value, the faster the velocity decays over time.
tool_stat.tconguns.bullet_volume.descrip: The intensity of noise generated during firing
tool_stat.tconguns.gun_accuracy.descript: Shooting accuracy: The lower this value, the greater the probability and degree of deviation from the crosshairs during firing
tool_stat.tconguns.gun_attack.descriptio: Base damage adjustment provided by guns
tool_stat.tconguns.gun_dual_wieldable.de: Whether can be wielded in both hands at once
tool_stat.tconguns.gun_magazine_capacity: Number of bullets loaded when the magazine is fully loaded
tool_stat.tconguns.gun_recoil_return.des: Speed coefficient for return to center after recoil
tool_stat.tconguns.gun_velocity.descript: Init velocity adjustment provided by guns
